title: cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. andasilbeensis
intro: Cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. andasilbeensis is a rare orchid species, often referred to as a type of flowering plant. It is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been reported to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Cynorkis tenuicalcar subsp. andasilbeensis include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves or roots, and can be used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
